# Virtual Radio — llms.txt

## What is Virtual Radio?
Virtual Radio (ramzradio.in) is a free, production-ready, real-time audio streaming web application.
It allows users to create custom-frequency online radio stations and broadcast synchronized audio to multiple listeners simultaneously with sub-3-second latency.

## Key Features
- Create a custom radio station with a unique FM frequency (0-100)
- Upload MP3 or WAV audio files to build a playlist
- Real-time synchronized playback across all listeners
- Drift correction every 3 seconds ensures everyone stays in sync
- Late joiners auto-sync to the exact current playback position
- No signup required — start broadcasting in seconds

## Target Use Cases
- Remote Teams: Play synchronized background music or ambient audio for distributed teams
- TTRPG / D&D: DMs can broadcast battle music or ambient soundscapes to players in real time
- Bedroom DJs / Producers: Share private demo sessions perfectly in sync for remote feedback
- Community & Church Broadcasts: Simple URL-based broadcasts for community events

## Technology
- Frontend: React 18, Zustand, Socket.IO Client
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Socket.IO
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend), separate Node.js host (backend)

## Important URLs
- Homepage: https://ramzradio.in/
- Sitemap: https://ramzradio.in/sitemap.xml

## Organization
- Name: Virtual Radio
- Website: https://ramzradio.in
